ddls:
CREATE TABLE "debug_info" (
  "debug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each debug information entry */,
  "code_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the code item the debug information belongs to */,
  "debug_type" TEXT /* Type of debug information (e.g., DBG_END_SEQUENCE, DBG_ADVANCE_PC, ...) */,
  "addr_diff" INTEGER /* Amount to add to address register (for DBG_ADVANCE_PC) */,
  "line_diff" INTEGER /* Amount to change line register by (for DBG_ADVANCE_LINE) */,
  "register_num" INTEGER /* Register that will contain local variable (for DBG_START_LOCAL and DBG_START_LOCAL_EXTENDED) */,
  "name_idx" INTEGER /* String index of the name (for DBG_START_LOCAL and DBG_START_LOCAL_EXTENDED) */,
  "type_idx" INTEGER /* Type index of the type (for DBG_START_LOCAL and DBG_START_LOCAL_EXTENDED) */,
  "sig_idx" INTEGER /* String index of the type signature (for DBG_START_LOCAL_EXTENDED) */,
  "instruction_sequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the instruction sequence associated with the debug information */,
  "start_address" INTEGER /* The starting address of the debug information */,
  "end_address" INTEGER /* The ending address of the debug information */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* The timestamp when the debug information was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("debug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_debug_info_sig_idx FOREIGN KEY ("sig_idx") REFERENCES type_signatures ("type_sig_idx"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_debug_info_name_idx FOREIGN KEY ("name_idx") REFERENCES strings ("string_idx"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_debug_info_type_idx FOREIGN KEY ("type_idx") REFERENCES strings ("string_idx"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_debug_info_code_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("code_item_id") REFERENCES code_items ("code_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_items" (
  "code_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code item */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code snippet for the code item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the code item */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* The name of the class or module to which the code item belongs */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* The file path of the code item */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* The starting line number of the code item */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last modification of the code item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strings" (
  "string_idx" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each string index */,
  "string_value" TEXT /* Value of the string index */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the string (e.g., code, user input, system) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the string was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("string_idx")
)

CREATE TABLE "type_signatures" (
  "type_sig_idx" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type signature index */,
  "type_sig_value" TEXT /* Value of the type signature index */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the type signature (e.g., code, library, system) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the type signature was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_sig_idx")
)
